applied: Applied armor-derived evaluation principles to all 17 weapon runes.
Added communityTier, communityTierScore, and communityTierReason to weapon DB entries.
Reused existing tier badge UI for weapon rune choices and ranking rows.
Kept expected damage calculation numeric-first; inferred tiers do not override calculated value.
